plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Ship software with rigor — ADRs, code review, debugging, deploys, docs, system design, tech debt, testing, standups, incidents.

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Turn raw data into decisions — SQL across dialects, exploration, stats, dashboards, publication-quality viz, and QA before you ship a number.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: Run product end-to-end — specs/PRDs, roadmaps, sprint planning, metrics review, research synthesis, competitive briefs, stakeholder updates.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: From exploration to pixel-perfect specs — critique, design systems, dev handoff, accessibility audits, UX copy, and research.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Plan, create, and measure — campaign briefs, multi-channel content, email sequences, SEO audits, brand review, and performance reporting.

plugins.name: operations
plugins.description: Keep the org running — process docs (RACI/flowcharts), runbooks, capacity + risk, change management, compliance, vendor review, status reports.

plugins.name: sales
plugins.description: Move deals forward — account research, call prep + summaries, personalized outreach, battlecards, forecasts, and pipeline reviews.

plugins.name: customer-support
plugins.description: Resolve faster — ticket triage, customer research, on-brand responses, escalations, KB articles, and sentiment scans.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Close clean and analyze — journal entries, reconciliation, statements, variance bridges, cash-flow forecasts, SOX testing, audit support.

plugins.name: legal
plugins.description: Speed in-house legal — contract review + redlines, NDA triage, compliance checks, risk assessment, e-signature routing, vendor checks.

plugins.name: human-resources
plugins.description: Run people ops — recruiting pipeline, interview prep, offers, onboarding, performance reviews, comp analysis, org planning, policy lookup, reports.

plugins.name: bio-research
plugins.description: Accelerate early-stage life-science R&D — literature review, target prioritization, experiment design, single-cell QC, pipeline runs.

plugins.name: enterprise-search
plugins.description: Find anything across your tools — one-query search, query-decomposition strategy, cross-source synthesis, digests, and source management.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Plan your day and capture work — meeting notes, standups, summaries, and pros/cons decisions, with local memory + calendar.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Sharpen written communication — polish emails, explain simply (ELI5), and summarize long text. A SUDO role Claude has no first-party bundle for.

plugins.name: small-business
plugins.description: Owner-in-the-loop SMB workflows — cash-flow, month-end close, invoice chasing, payroll planning, lead triage, customer pulse, tax prep, QBR.

plugins.name: pdf-viewer
plugins.description: View, annotate, fill, and sign PDFs in an interactive viewer via the live PDF MCP connector.

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Defensive security depth Claude has no first-party bundle for — threat modeling, code audits, secrets scans, dependency CVEs, IR, hardening, access review.

plugins.name: devops
plugins.description: Platform engineering Claude has no first-party bundle for — CI/CD, Dockerfiles, Kubernetes, Terraform, observability, runbooks, release checklists.
